artifacts.summary: Deep mathematical analysis of discrete_Icc_finite_axiom debt. Covering lemma is the critical gap. Recommends accepting axiom and making LocallyFiniteOrder explicit in DiscreteTemporalFrame typeclass.

next_steps: Run /plan 981 to create implementation plan for typeclass modification

key_findings: Covering lemma is THE critical gap - all approaches reduce to it
DF creates existential F-obligations that don't constrain intermediates
Density proof template does not invert to covering proof
LocallyFiniteOrder should be explicit typeclass requirement
Axiom is mathematically sound - discrete orders have finite intervals
Multiple approaches (h_content duality, phi=neg_bot, density inversion) all blocked
metadata.recommendation: Accept axiom as architectural constraint; make LocallyFiniteOrder explicit in DiscreteTemporalFrame
